de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule

Class JoinRuleUtils

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule.JoinRuleUtils

  • public class JoinRuleUtils
extends Object
    This class encapsulates static methods used in the JoinRule implementation. The methods are organized into different sections (see comments):

    1. SIMPLE AUXILIARIES
    2. GENERAL LOGIC
      1. Syntax
      2. Provability
      3. Simplification
      4. Calculus
    3. JOIN RELATED
    4. PRIVATE
    Feel free to make private methods publicly visible if you need them.
    Author:
    Dominic Scheurer

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      private static class  JoinRuleUtils.CollectLocationVariablesVisitor
      Visitor for collecting program locations in a Java block.
      private static class  JoinRuleUtils.CollectLocationVariablesVisitorHashSet
      Visitor for collecting program locations in a Java block.
      private static class  JoinRuleUtils.LocVarReplBranchUniqueMap
      Map for renaming variables to their branch-unique names.
      static class  JoinRuleUtils.Option<T>
      A simple Scala-like option type: Either Some(value) or None.
      (package private) static class  JoinRuleUtils.TermWrapper
      Simple term wrapper for comparing terms modulo renaming.
      (package private) static class  JoinRuleUtils.TermWrapperFactory
      Creates JoinRuleUtils.TermWrapper objects, thereby ensuring that equal term wrappers also have equal hash codes.

      Dissects a conjunction into its conjunctive elements.

      static Node getIntroducingNodeforLocVar(LocationVariable var, Node node)
      Finds the node, from the given leaf on, where the variable was introduced.
      static JavaBlock getJavaBlockRecursive(Term term)
      Returns the first Java block in the given term that can be found by recursive search, or the empty block if there is no non-empty Java block in the term.

      static boolean isProvable(Sequent toProve, Services services, int timeout)
      Tries to prove the given formula without splitting and returns whether the prove could be closed.

      Tries to prove the given formula and returns whether the prove could be closed.
      static boolean isProvable(Term toProve, Services services, int timeout)
      Tries to prove the given formula without splitting and returns whether the prove could be closed.

      Checks if an update is of the form { x := v || ...
      private static Term joinConjuctiveElements(List<Term> elems, Services services)
      Joins a list of formulae to a conjunction.
      private static Term joinListToAndTerm(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> formulae, Services services)
      Joins a list of sequent formulae to an and-connected term.
      private static LocationVariable lookupVarInNS(String name, Services services)
      Looks up a program variable by its name in the PV namespace.
      static boolean pathConditionsAreDistinguishable(Term pathCondition1, Term pathCondition2, Services services)
      Checks if two given path conditions are distinguishable.
      private static Term sequentToFormula(Sequent sequent, Services services)
      Converts a Sequent "Gamma ==> Delta" into a single formula equivalent to "/\ Gamma -> \/ Delta"; however, the formulae in Gamma are shifted to the succedent by the negation-left rule, so the result of this method is a disjunction, not an implication.
      static SymbolicExecutionState sequentToSEPair(Node node, PosInOccurrence pio, Services services)
      Converts a sequent (given by goal & pos in occurrence) to an SE state (U,C).
      static SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt sequentToSETriple(Node node, PosInOccurrence pio, Services services)
      Converts a sequent (given by goal & pos in occurrence) to an SE state (U,C,p).

    • Method Detail

      • stripIndex

        public static String stripIndex(String name)
        For Strings "xxx_i", this method returns "xxx". For Strings without the underscore, the original String is returned.
        Parameters:
        name - Name to remove the index from.
        Returns:
        The name without the index, if any.

      • translateToFormula

        public static Term translateToFormula(Services services,
                      String toTranslate)
        Translates a String into a formula or to null if not applicable.
        Parameters:
        services - The services object.
        toTranslate - The formula to be translated.
        Returns:
        The formula represented by the input or null if not applicable.

      • getUpdateRightSideFor

        public static Term getUpdateRightSideFor(Term update,
                         LocationVariable leftSide)
        Returns the right side for a given location variable in an update (in normal form).
        Parameters:
        update - Update term to search.
        leftSide - Left side to find the right side for.
        Returns:
        The right side in the update for the given left side.

      • countAtoms

        public static int countAtoms(Term term)
        Counts the atoms in a formula.
        Parameters:
        term - Formula to count atoms for.
        Returns:
        Number of atoms in the formula
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if the supplied term is not a formula

      • countDisjunctions

        public static int countDisjunctions(Term term,
                    boolean negated)
        Counts the disjunctions in a formula.
        Parameters:
        term - Formula to count disjunctions for.
        negated - Set to true iff the current subformula is in the scope of a negation; in this case, "and" junctors have the role of "or" junctors considering the disjunctive complexity.
        Returns:
        Number of disjunctions in the formula
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if the supplied term is not a formula

      • getNewSkolemConstantForPrefix

        public static Function getNewSkolemConstantForPrefix(String prefix,
                                     Sort sort,
                                     Services services)
        Computes and registers a new Skolem constant with the given prefix in its name of the given sort.
        Parameters:
        prefix - Prefix for the name of the constant.
        sort - Sort of the constant.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        A new Skolem constant of the given sort with the given prefix in its name.

      • getFreshVariableForPrefix

        public static LogicVariable getFreshVariableForPrefix(String prefix,
                                      Sort sort,
                                      Services services)
        Computes and registers a fresh variable with the given prefix in its name of the given sort.
        Parameters:
        prefix - Prefix for the name of the variable.
        sort - Sort of the variable.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        A fresh variable of the given sort with the given prefix in its name.

      • substConstantsByFreshVars

        public static Term substConstantsByFreshVars(Term term,
                             HashMap<Function,LogicVariable> replMap,
                             Services services)
        Substitutes all constants in the given term by fresh variables. Multiple occurrences of a constant are substituted by the same variable.
        Parameters:
        term - Term in which to substitute constants by variables.
        replMap - Map from constants to variables in order to remember substitutions of one constant.
        Returns:
        A term equal to the input, but with constants substituted by fresh variables.

      • substConstantsByFreshVars

        public static Term substConstantsByFreshVars(Term term,
                             HashSet<Function> restrictTo,
                             HashMap<Function,LogicVariable> replMap,
                             Services services)
        Substitutes all constants in the given term that are contained in the set restrictTo by fresh variables. If restrictTo is null, then all constants in the term are replaced. Multiple occurrences of a constant are substituted by the same variable.
        Parameters:
        term - Term in which to substitute constants by variables.
        restrictTo - Set of constants to replace. If null, all constants are replaced.
        replMap - Map from constants to variables in order to remember substitutions of one constant.
        Returns:
        A term equal to the input, but with constants substituted by fresh variables.

      • exClosure

        public static Term exClosure(Term term,
             Services services)
        Existentially closes all logical and location variables in the given term.
        Parameters:
        term - Term to existentially close.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        A new term which is equivalent to the existential closure of the argument term.

      • allClosure

        public static Term allClosure(Term term,
              Services services)
        Universally closes all logical and location variables in the given term.
        Parameters:
        term - Term to universally close.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        A new term which is equivalent to the universal closure of the argument term.

      • isUpdateNormalForm

        public static boolean isUpdateNormalForm(Term u)
        Checks if an update is of the form { x := v || ... || z := q}.
        Parameters:
        u - Update to check.
        Returns:
        true iff u is in normal form.

      • getConjunctiveElementsFor

        public static ArrayList<Term> getConjunctiveElementsFor(Term term)
        Dissects a conjunction into its conjunctive elements.
        Parameters:
        term - Conjunctive formula to dissect (may be a conjunction of one element, i.e. no "real" conjunction). In this case, the resulting list will contain exactly the supplied formula.
        Returns:
        The conjunctive elements of the supplied formula.

      • getBranchUniqueLocVar

        public static LocationVariable getBranchUniqueLocVar(LocationVariable var,
                                     Node startLeaf)
        Find a location variable for the given one that is unique for the branch corresponding to the given goal, but not necessarily globally unique. The variable with the first branch-unique name w.r.t. a numeric index is returned.
        Parameters:
        var - Variable to get a branch-unique correspondent for.
        startLeaf - The leaf of the branch.
        Returns:
        The first indexed PV that is unique w.r.t. the given branch, but not with the global variable registry.

      • getIntroducingNodeforLocVar

        public static Node getIntroducingNodeforLocVar(LocationVariable var,
                               Node node)
        Finds the node, from the given leaf on, where the variable was introduced.
        Parameters:
        var - Variable to find introducing node for.
        node - Leaf to start from.
        Returns:
        The node where the variable was introduced.

      • getJavaBlockRecursive

        public static JavaBlock getJavaBlockRecursive(Term term)
        Returns the first Java block in the given term that can be found by recursive search, or the empty block if there is no non-empty Java block in the term.
        Parameters:
        term - The term to extract Java blocks for.
        Returns:
        The first Java block in the given term or the empty block if there is no non-empty Java block.

      • isProvable

        public static boolean isProvable(Term toProve,
                 Services services,
                 int timeout)
        Tries to prove the given formula without splitting and returns whether the prove could be closed.
        Parameters:
        toProve - Formula to prove.
        services - The services object.
        timeout - Time in milliseconds after which the side proof is aborted.
        Returns:
        True iff the given formula has been successfully proven.

                              Services services,
                              int timeout)

        Parameters:
        toProve - Formula to prove.
        services - The services object.
        timeout - Time in milliseconds after which the side proof is aborted.
        Returns:
        True iff the given formula has been successfully proven.

        public static boolean isProvable(Sequent toProve,
                 Services services,
                 int timeout)
        Tries to prove the given formula without splitting and returns whether the prove could be closed.
        Parameters:
        toProve - Sequent to prove.
        services - The services object.
        timeout - Time in milliseconds after which the side proof is aborted.
        Returns:
        True iff the given formula has been successfully proven.

      • isProvableWithSplitting

        public static boolean isProvableWithSplitting(Sequent toProve,
                              Services services,
                              int timeout)
        Tries to prove the given formula with splitting and returns whether the prove could be closed.
        Parameters:
        toProve - Sequent to prove.
        services - The services object.
        timeout - Time in milliseconds after which the side proof is aborted.
        Returns:
        True iff the given formula has been successfully proven.

      • assertEquivalent

        public static void assertEquivalent(Term term1,
                    Term term2,
                    Services services,
                    int timeout)
        Tries to prove the equivalence of term1 and term2 and throws a RuntimeException if the proof fails.
        Parameters:
        term1 - First term to check.
        term2 - Second term to check.
        services - The services object.
        timeout - Time in milliseconds after which the side proof is aborted.
        Throws:
        RuntimeException - iff proving the equivalence of term1 and term2 fails.

      • trySimplify

        public static Term trySimplify(Proof parentProof,
               Term term,
               boolean countDisjunctions,
               int timeout)
        Tries to simplifies the given Term in a side proof with splits. If this attempt is successful, i.e. the number of atoms in the simplified formula is lower (and, if requested, also the number of disjunctions), the simplified formula is returned; otherwise, the original formula is returned.

        Please note that using this method can consume a great amount of time!

        Parameters:
        parentProof - The parent Proof.
        term - The Term to simplify.
        countDisjunctions - If set to true, the method also takes the number of disjunctions (in addition to the number of atoms) into account when judging about the complexity of the "simplified" formula.
        timeout - Time in milliseconds after which the side proof is aborted.
        Returns:
        The simplified Term or the original term, if simplification was not successful.
        See Also:
        #simplify(Proof, Term), SymbolicExecutionUtil#simplify(Proof, Term)

      • clearSemisequent

        public static void clearSemisequent(Goal goal,
                    boolean antec)
        Deletes all formulae of the succedent / antecedent.
        Parameters:
        goal - Goal to delete formulae from.
        antec - If true, antecedent formulae are deleted, else succedent formulae.

      • equalsModBranchUniqueRenaming

        public static boolean equalsModBranchUniqueRenaming(SourceElement se1,
                                    SourceElement se2,
                                    Node node,
                                    Services services)
        An equals method that, before the comparison, replaces all program locations in the supplied arguments by their branch-unique versions.
        Parameters:
        se1 - First element to check equality (mod renaming) for.
        se2 - Second element to check equality (mod renaming) for.
        goal - The goal of the current branch (for getting branch-unique names).
        services - The Services object.
        Returns:
        true iff source elements can be matched, considering branch-unique location names.

      • createSimplifiedDisjunctivePathCondition

        public static Term createSimplifiedDisjunctivePathCondition(Term cond1,
                                            Term cond2,
                                            Services services,
                                            int simplificationTimeout)
        Creates a path condition that is equivalent to the disjunction of the two supplied formulae, but possibly simpler. In the ideal case, the returned formula can be literally shorter than each of the two formulae; in this case, it consists of the common elements of those.

        The underlying idea is based upon the observation that many path conditions that should be joined are conjunctions of mostly the same elements and, in addition, formulae phi and !phi that vanish after creating the disjunction of the path conditions. The corresponding valid formula is (phi & psi) | (phi & !psi) <-> phi

        For formulae that cannot be simplified by this law, the method performs two additional steps:
        (1) it applies, if possible, distributivity to simplify the result
        (2) it checks whether the disjunction is already equivalent to the common parts of the formulae only. This often happens when merging all branches that occur in symbolic execution.

        Parameters:
        cond1 - First path condition to join.
        cond2 - Second path condition to join.
        services - The services object.
        timeout - Time in milliseconds after which the side proof is aborted.
        Returns:
        A path condition that is equivalent to the disjunction of the two supplied formulae, but possibly simpler.

      • getDistinguishingFormula

        public static JoinRuleUtils.Option<Pair<Term,Term>> getDistinguishingFormula(Term pathCondition1,
                                                             Term pathCondition2,
                                                             Services services)
        Computes a formula that implies pathCondition1 and, if pathCondition1 and pathCondition2 are contradicting, does not imply pathCondition2. The computed formula is at most as complex as pathCondition1. This so generated distinguishing formula is returned in the first element of the pair; the "rest" is contained in the second. It always holds that the conjunction of the first element of the pair and the second element of the pair is equivalent to pathCondition1.
        Parameters:
        pathCondition1 - The first formula to compute a distinguishing formula for.
        pathCondition2 - The second formula to compute a distinguishing formula for.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        (1) A formula that implies pathCondition1 and, if pathCondition1 and pathCondition2 are contradicting, does not imply pathCondition2, and (2) the "rest" of pathCondition1 that is common with pathCondition2.

      • pathConditionsAreDistinguishable

        public static boolean pathConditionsAreDistinguishable(Term pathCondition1,
                                       Term pathCondition2,
                                       Services services)
        Checks if two given path conditions are distinguishable.
        Parameters:
        pathCondition1 - First path condition to check.
        pathCondition2 - Second path condition to check.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        True iff the two given path conditions are distinguishable.

      • closeJoinPartnerGoal

        public static void closeJoinPartnerGoal(Node joinNodeParent,
                        Goal joinPartner,
                        PosInOccurrence pio,
                        SymbolicExecutionState joinState,
                        SymbolicExecutionState joinPartnerState,
                        Term pc)
        Closes the given partner goal, using the CloseAfterJoin rule.
        Parameters:
        joinNodeParent - Parent of remaining join node.
        joinPartner - Partner goal to close.

      • sequentToSEPair

        public static SymbolicExecutionState sequentToSEPair(Node node,
                                     PosInOccurrence pio,
                                     Services services)
        Converts a sequent (given by goal & pos in occurrence) to an SE state (U,C). Thereby, all program variables occurring in the symbolic state are replaced by branch-unique correspondents in order to enable merging of different branches declaring local variables.

        Parameters:
        goal - Current goal.
        pio - Position of update-program counter formula in goal.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        An SE state (U,C).
        See Also:
        #sequentToSETriple(Goal, PosInOccurrence, Services)

      • sequentToSETriple

        public static SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt sequentToSETriple(Node node,
                                                  PosInOccurrence pio,
                                                  Services services)
        Converts a sequent (given by goal & pos in occurrence) to an SE state (U,C,p). Thereby, all program variables occurring in the program counter and in the symbolic state are replaced by branch-unique correspondents in order to enable merging of different branches declaring local variables.

        The problem which makes this renaming necessary is the fact that when executing a program like int x; x = ..., the variable x is renamed to x_1, x_2 and so on in different branches, which makes a "normal" merging impossible. Branch unique names are tracked in the LocationVariables when they are renamed in InnerVariableNamer. Soundness is not effected by the switch to branch-unique names. However, merged nodes are then of course potentially different from their predecessors concerning the involved local variable symbols.

        Parameters:
        goal - Current goal.
        pio - Position of update-program counter formula in goal.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        An SE state (U,C,p).

      • anonymizeProgramVariables

        private static Pair<Term,ImmutableSet<QuantifiableVariable>> anonymizeProgramVariables(Term term,
                                                                      Services services)
        Anonymizes all program variables occurring in the given term. If x is a PV in the term, the result will be of the form { ... || x := vx || ...} term where vx is a fresh variable. Returns all free variables of the new termin the second component of the pair.
        Parameters:
        term - Term to anonymize.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        A term of the form { ... || x := vx || ...} term for every PV x occurring in the term, where vx is a fresh variable.

      • joinListToAndTerm

        private static Term joinListToAndTerm(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> formulae,
                     Services services)
        Joins a list of sequent formulae to an and-connected term.
        Parameters:
        formulae - Formulae to join.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        And-formula connecting the given terms.

      • getProgramLocations

        private static ImmutableSet<LocationVariable> getProgramLocations(Term programCounterTerm,
                                                 Services services)
        Returns all used program locations in the given term. The term must be of the form \<{ ... }\> phi (or \[{ ... }\] phi).
        Parameters:
        programCounterTerm - The term (program counter) to extract locations from.
        services - The Services object.
        Returns:
        The set of contained program locations.

      • getProgramLocationsHashSet

        private static HashSet<LocationVariable> getProgramLocationsHashSet(Term programCounterTerm,
                                                   Services services)
        Returns all used program locations in the given term. The term must be of the form \<{ ... }\> phi (or \[{ ... }\] phi).
        Parameters:
        programCounterTerm - The term (program counter) to extract locations from.
        services - The Services object.
        Returns:
        The set of contained program locations.

      • joinConjuctiveElements

        private static Term joinConjuctiveElements(List<Term> elems,
                          Services services)
        Joins a list of formulae to a conjunction.
        Parameters:
        elems - Formulae to join.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        A conjunction of the supplied formulae.

      • tryToProve

        private static ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo tryToProve(Term toProve,
                                         Services services,
                                         boolean doSplit,
                                         String sideProofName,
                                         int timeout)
        Tries to prove the given formula and returns the result.
        Parameters:
        toProve - Formula to prove.
        services - The services object.
        doSplit - if true, splitting is allowed (normal mode).
        sideProofName - name for the generated side proof.
        timeout - A timeout for the proof in milliseconds.
        Returns:
        The proof result.

      • tryToProve

        private static ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo tryToProve(Sequent toProve,
                                         Services services,
                                         boolean doSplit,
                                         String sideProofName,
                                         int timeout)
        Tries to prove the given formula and returns the result.
        Parameters:
        toProve - Sequent to prove.
        services - The services object.
        doSplit - if true, splitting is allowed (normal mode).
        sideProofName - name for the generated side proof.
        timeout - A timeout for the proof in milliseconds.
        Returns:
        The proof result.

      • isProvable

        private static boolean isProvable(Term toProve,
                 Services services,
                 boolean doSplit,
                 int timeout)
        Tries to prove the given formula and returns whether the prove could be closed.
        Parameters:
        toProve - Formula to prove.
        services - The services object.
        doSplit - if true, splitting is allowed (normal mode).
        timeout - Time in milliseconds after which the side proof is aborted.
        Returns:
        True iff the given formula has been successfully proven.

      • isProvable

        private static boolean isProvable(Sequent toProve,
                 Services services,
                 boolean doSplit,
                 int timeout)
        Tries to prove the given formula and returns whether the prove could be closed.
        Parameters:
        toProve - Sequent to prove.
        services - The services object.
        doSplit - if true, splitting is allowed (normal mode).
        timeout - Time in milliseconds after which the side proof is aborted.
        Returns:
        True iff the given formula has been successfully proven.

      • simplify

        private static Term simplify(Proof parentProof,
            Term term,
            int timeout)
                      throws ProofInputException
        Simplifies the given Term in a side proof with splits. This code has been copied from SymbolicExecutionUtil and only been slightly modified (to allow for splitting the proof).
        Parameters:
        parentProof - The parent Proof.
        term - The Term to simplify.
        timeout - Time in milliseconds after which the side proof is aborted.
        Returns:
        The simplified Term.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
        See Also:
        SymbolicExecutionUtil#simplify(Proof, Term)

      • sequentToFormula

        private static Term sequentToFormula(Sequent sequent,
                    Services services)
        Converts a Sequent "Gamma ==> Delta" into a single formula equivalent to "/\ Gamma -> \/ Delta"; however, the formulae in Gamma are shifted to the succedent by the negation-left rule, so the result of this method is a disjunction, not an implication.
        Parameters:
        sequent - The sequent to convert to a formula.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        A formula equivalent to the given sequent.

      • isUniqueInGlobals

        private static boolean isUniqueInGlobals(String name,
                        ImmutableSet<ProgramVariable> globals)
        Tells whether a name is unique in the passed list of global variables.
        Parameters:
        name - The name to check uniqueness for.
        globals - The global variables for the givan branch.
        See Also:
        VariableNamer.isUniqueInGlobals(String, Globals)

      • lookupVarInNS

        private static LocationVariable lookupVarInNS(String name,
                             Services services)
        Looks up a program variable by its name in the PV namespace.
        Parameters:
        name - Name to find a PV for.
        Returns:
        The PV with the given name in the global namespace, or null if there is none.
